Uses of Class
org.moeaframework.util.RotationMatrixBuilder

Packages that use RotationMatrixBuilder
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.util
Collection of general-purpose utilities.

  • Uses of RotationMatrixBuilder in org.moeaframework.util

    Methods in org.moeaframework.util that return RotationMatrixBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RotationMatrixBuilder
    RotationMatrixBuilder.rotateAll()
    Rotates all 2D rotation planes and assigns each a random rotation angle.
    RotationMatrixBuilder
    RotationMatrixBuilder.rotateK(int k)
    Rotates k randomly-selected but unique 2D rotation planes and assigns each a random rotation angle.
    RotationMatrixBuilder
    RotationMatrixBuilder.rotatePlane(int i, int j)
    Adds a rotation around the 2D rotation plane defined by the two axes.
    RotationMatrixBuilder
    RotationMatrixBuilder.withRandomThetas()
    Assigns random rotation angles to all 2D rotation planes added to this builder.
    RotationMatrixBuilder
    RotationMatrixBuilder.withTheta(double theta)
    Sets the rotation angle, in radians, of the last 2D rotation plane added to this builder.
    RotationMatrixBuilder
    RotationMatrixBuilder.withThetas(double theta)
    Sets the rotation angle, in radians, of all 2D rotation planes added to this builder.
